title: crotalaria berteroana var. yasminii
intro: Crotalaria berteroana var. yasminii, also known as Yasmin's rattlebox or Yasmin's caltrop, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria berteroana var. yasminii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
